name: discrepancyHold-active-major-loan-amount
rationale: Broker initial intake includes loan_application doc showing requested_loan_amount $95,000. Broker subsequently corrects to $280,000 via reply email (>30% discrepancy from doc). Canonical-map suppresses loan_app source (R11-B-1 Layer 1); discrepancyHold ACTIVATES; preliminary-review email is NOT auto-sent (R10-F symmetric coverage). Expected behavior: deal held for admin review with discrepancy flagged in Risk Factors.
notes: Two-event sequence. Initial intake + correction. Tests both canonical-map source-hierarchy suppression (F1.LA) and state-derived gate signal (F2.DH discrepancyHold ACTIVE).
